firstLine: O Thou who hearest every heartfelt prayer,

title: The Lord Bless You and Keep You
firstLine: The Lord bless you and keep you,

title: We Give Thee But Thine Own
firstLine: We give Thee but Thine own,

title: Now, Dear Lord, As We Pray
firstLine: Now, dear Lord, as we pray,

title: Spirit of the Living God
firstLine: Spirit of the living God,

title: May God Be With You
firstLine: May God be with you Till we meet again,

title: Shalom
firstLine: Shalom, good friends,

title: May the Lord Bless and Keep You
firstLine: May the Lord bless you and keep you

title: Thy Word Is a Lantern
firstLine: Thy Word is a lantern unto my feet,

title: Heavenly Father, to Thee We Pray
firstLine: Heavenly Father, to Thee we pray,

title: God Be in My Head
firstLine: God be in my head, and in my understanding;

title: God Be in My Head
firstLine: God be in my head,

title: Holy Spirit, Hear Us
firstLine: Holy Spirit, hear us;

title: This Is the Day the Lord Hath Made
firstLine: This is the day the Lord hath made;

title: As You Have Promised, Lord
firstLine: As You have promised, Lord, today,

title: Jesus, Stand Among Us
firstLine: Jesus, stand among us

title: Hear Our Prayer, O Lord
firstLine: Hear Our Prayer, O Lord,

title: Cause Me to Hear
firstLine: Cause me to hear Thy loving kindness in the morning,

title: Bless Thou the Gifts
firstLine: Bless thou the gifts our hands have brought;

title: The Lord Is in His Holy Temple
firstLine: The Lord is in HIs holy temple,

title: Surely, Surely
firstLine: Surely, surely the Lord has been here,

title: Day by Day, Dear Lord
firstLine: Day by day, Dear Lord, of Thee three things I pray:

title: Dismiss Us, Lord With Blessing
firstLine: Dismiss us, Lord, with blessing, we pray;

title: Lead Me, Lord
firstLine: Lead me, Lord, lead me in thy righteousness;

title: The Lord Is in His Holy Temple
firstLine: The Lord is in His holy temple,

title: Almighty Father
firstLine: Almighty Father, hear our prayer,

title: Praise God, From Whom All Blessings
firstLine: Praise God, from Whom all blessings flow;

title: Praise God, From Whom All Blessings
firstLine: Praise God, from Whom all blessings flow;
